title: Raid Renegades Java Server
description: A updated pack for the Raid Renegades Server. Embark on a harrowing adventure full of Magic and Swords, in a world full of monsters, dragons and structures from an eon past!
body:
This is the offical mod pack for the Raid Renegades Server. Embark on a harrowing adventure full of Magic and Swords, in a world full of monsters, dragons and structures from an eon past! Discover hidden treasures, lost temples of gods that have long fled, and villages teming with new life and trades!

Magic is abundant here. Find the lost scrolls and build the ultimate tomes to destroy all who oppose you!

Fight Vampires as a cold Vampire Hunter! Or join the undead as a blood sucking fiend.

Even tame and ride mighty dragons! Or hunt them down for their treasure!

All these choices and more are waiting for you! Join us as we discover the world together!
